also_known_as: มาร์ติน คลูนส์
マーティン・クルーンズ
biography: Martin Clunes (born 28 November 1961) is an English actor, director, and presenter, best known for Doc Martin, Men Behaving Badly, and William and Mary. Born in London, he began his career in TV in the 1980s. He's also narrated documentaries and was honored with an OBE in 2015 for contributions to drama and charity.
name: Martin Clunes
